description.psitweaks.sculk_eroder: Corrodes stone, dirt, and sand type blocks into Sculk
description.psitweaks.material_mutator: Mutates items into different materials using Psionic Echo Gas
description.psitweaks.psionic_generator: Consumes the owner's Psi and converts it into FE while linked
description.psitweaks.magicians_brain: Left behind when a Magician meets a brutal end.
message.psitweaks.cad_disassembler.unsup: Failed to safely disassemble this TiCCAD.

psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_explode_no_de: Cause an explosion that does not destroy blocks
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_hardening.des: When taking heavy damage, reduce it to a certain value
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_parade.desc: Avoid damage with a certain probability
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_interact_bloc: Right-click with the off-hand item on the target block
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_break_fortune: Break a block with Fortune applied
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_break_silk.de: Break a block with Silk Touch applied
Store the entity's UUID in the CAD memory
psitweaks.spellpiece.selector_stored_ent: Retrieve entities from the UUID stored in the CAD memory
psitweaks.spellpiece.selector_nearby_spe: Retrieve SpellGram objects around the specified position
psitweaks.spellerror.not_spellgram_objec: ERROR: The input must be a SpellGramObject
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_dispel_benefi: Remove beneficial effects from target entity
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_dispel_non_be: Remove non beneficial effects from target entity
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_cocytus.desc: Permanently freeze the target mob's mind
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_time_accelera: Accelerates the time of the target block
Vibrates ultrasonic waves to emit heat rays
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_supply_fe.des: Supplies FE to blocks. Direction can be specified.
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_supreme_infus: Infuse Echo Shards into Psionic Echoes
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_molecular_div: divide the living creatures within the area
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_aqua_cutter.d: Launches a water blade projectile that damages on hit
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_blaze_ball.de: Launches a fireball forward that deals fire damage on hit
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_radiation_inj: Applies radiation exposure to the target
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_radiation_fil: Applies a radiation filter effect to the target
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_cure_radiatio: Removes radiation exposure from the target
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_guillotine.de: Deals a heavy slash to the target and drops a head on kill
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_active_air_mi: Deals magic damage to entities inside a spherical area around the target position
Places a flare Spell Gram Circle that repeatedly deals fire damage around it
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_ice_circle.de: Places an ice Spell Gram Circle that repeatedly deals freeze damage around it
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_set_spellgram: Sets the follow target entity for a SpellGram object
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_die_flex.desc: Stops execution when given a number whose absolute value is less than 1, and refunds Psi cost for skipped pieces. When used in spells that cast every tick, client-side Psi display may temporarily desync.
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_material_muta: Acts on a specific block, alters its material structure, and transmutes it into a different substance.
modifier.psitweaks.psi_buffer.descriptio: When worn as armor, consumes Psi to absorb incoming damage
modifier.psitweaks.load_computation.desc: When Psi is sufficient, consumes a fixed amount to add bonus magic damage on attack
modifier.psitweaks.casting_assist.descri: Reduces spell Psi cost while this tool is held or worn as armor (does not stack)
modifier.psitweaks.erosion_computation.d: On attack, applies debuffs and siphons a small amount of Psi from the target
modifier.psitweaks.psicological.descript: While held or equipped, periodically consumes Psi to repair durability and can spend Psi instead of durability loss
modifier.psitweaks.global_traveler.descr: Sneak-right-click an inventory block to link it; block and mob drops from this tool are routed there when possible
modifier.psitweaks.mind_crush.descriptio: On attack, has a level×5% chance to freeze the target mob with NoAI. When worn as armor, triggers on the attacker instead
psi.book.category.psitweaks.desc: $(thing)PsiTweaks$(0) expands Psi with stronger spell bullets, CAD parts, machinery, Mekanism integration, and late-game psionic materials.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_overview.0: $(thing)PsiTweaks$(0) is an expansion for $(thing)Psi$(0). It keeps spell programming at the center, then adds more ways to automate, amplify, store, and industrialize psionic power.$(p)The mod is intended for packs where Psi grows into a long-term progression system rather than ending at the base CAD and common bullets.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_overview.1: $(item)Psionic Control Circuits$(0) are used as a bridge between Psi materials and machine-style crafting. If a recipe looks technological but still clearly belongs to spellcraft, this component is often involved.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_overview.2: Major additions include higher-tier spell bullets, new CAD assemblies and casting tools, psionic resource attributes, research and mutation machines, and a Psi-powered generator for Mekanism energy networks.$(p)Most systems are built to reward stronger Psi capacity, regeneration, and spell damage investment.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spell_bullets.0: $(thing)PsiTweaks$(0) adds several tiers above the ordinary $(item)Spell Bullet$(0). These bullets are meant for stronger or more specialized CAD setups, and many bullet shapes have upgraded variants.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spell_bullets.1: The base upgraded bullets form the progression ladder. Shape-specific versions such as projectile, mine, loopcast, grenade, circle, and charge variants follow the same tier idea.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spell_bullets.2: Higher tiers are not just cosmetic. They are intended to sit alongside late-game CAD materials and more demanding spell setups.$(p)When building a combat or utility kit, treat bullet tier as part of the whole casting system: CAD stats, Psi capacity, regeneration, and spell cost all matter.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_machines.0: PsiTweaks adds machines that connect spellcraft with automation and industrial processing. Some machines are pure psionic tools, while others integrate with Mekanism-style energy and materials.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_machines.1: These machines are the main entry points for research, mutation, Sculk processing, and Psi-to-energy conversion.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_machines.2: The $(item)Psi-Link Generator$(0) links to its Mekanism owner. When enabled, loaded, and the owner is online, it consumes that player's Psi and produces energy for the machine's buffer.$(p)The rate is set in the GUI. More Psi per tick means more power, but it also drains the owner faster.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_cad_and_gear.0: Several PsiTweaks items make spellcasting easier to carry, automate, or specialize. Some are direct CAD tools, while others support bullet handling or improve a caster's combat role.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_cad_and_gear.1: These recipes cover portable assembly, inline casting, spell storage, and caster support gear.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_cad_and_gear.2: PsiTweaks also adds new CAD assemblies and psionic materials for stronger progression. Use them together with the upgraded bullets and attributes when ordinary Psi equipment no longer keeps up.
psi.book.category.psitweaks_spell_pieces: Spell pieces added by PsiTweaks. Many are offensive, industrial, or utility-focused, and some require research depending on the config.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spellpiece.trick: Creates an explosion that damages without destroying blocks. It is useful when you want blast-style area damage without mining the landscape or breaking machine setups.
Applies a defensive barrier effect that reduces incoming damage. It is intended for protective spell kits and works best when paired with enough Psi capacity to keep defensive casts sustainable.
Adds a hardening effect that cuts large incoming hits down to a safer amount. Use it as an emergency mitigation layer rather than a replacement for armor.
Adds a chance-based evasion effect. Parade is a defensive utility for avoiding hits outright, especially when combined with other survival-focused PsiTweaks gear.
Enables creative-style flight for the target. This is one of the strongest utility tricks and is usually treated as a late-progression mobility option.
Uses the caster's off-hand item on the target block, as if right-clicking that block. This is useful for automation-like spells that need to activate or place through a CAD.
Breaks a target block with Fortune applied. It is a harvesting trick for resource gathering when normal block breaking would waste valuable drops.
Breaks a target block with Silk Touch applied. Use it when the block itself is more important than its normal drops.
Stores a target entity's UUID in CAD memory. It pairs with Selector: Stored Entity so later spell casts can find the same entity again.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spellpiece.selec: Reads an entity from the UUID stored in CAD memory. This selector is the retrieval half of the stored-entity system.
Finds nearby SpellGram objects around a position. It is mainly used by spells that control or coordinate placed SpellGram effects.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spellpiece.trick: Removes effects from the target entity. This general version does not distinguish between helpful and harmful effects.
Removes only beneficial effects from the target entity. It is the hostile or control-oriented version of Dispel.
Removes non-beneficial effects from the target entity. It is useful for cleansing allies without stripping their buffs.
Freezes a mob's mind permanently. The target is locked down rather than simply damaged, making this a very powerful control trick.
Supplies FE to a block at the target position, with direction support. It lets a spell act as a small energy transfer tool.
Accelerates the tick rate of a valid target block, similar in concept to time-in-a-bottle style effects. Current practical speed is limited by CAD performance.
Fires a high-power heat ray by vibrating ultrasonic waves. It is a heavy offensive trick and has configurable damage scaling.
Infuses Echo Shards into Psionic Echo. This is a progression trick used for advanced psionic materials and related Mekanism integration.
Cuts living creatures through a plane defined by three points. It is an area attack whose cost and damage are balanced for stronger CAD setups.
Launches a water blade projectile forward. It is a general-purpose attack trick available earlier than many of the late-game offensive options.
Launches a fireball forward to deal fire damage on impact. It is a direct projectile attack added as part of the research-era spell set.
Creates a spherical shockwave at the target position and damages entities inside it. This is an area attack for trapping or detonating a location.
Places a fire SpellGram Circle that repeatedly damages entities inside it. Use it to hold an area rather than to deal one instant hit.
Places an ice SpellGram Circle that repeatedly deals freezing damage inside it. It fills the same area-control role as Fire Circle, but with ice-themed damage.
Sets a SpellGram object's follow target entity. Combine it with Selector: Nearby SpellGram Object to control already placed SpellGram effects.
Stops execution like Psi's Trick: Die, but refunds Psi cost for skipped spell pieces. Very frequent casts may temporarily desync the client-side Psi display.
Applies Mekanism radiation exposure to the target. Its exposure amount scales exponentially with power, so stronger casts become much more dangerous.
Applies a radiation filter effect to protect the target from radiation exposure. It is the defensive counterpart to Radiation Injection.
Removes radiation exposure from the target. This is a cleanup and recovery trick for worlds where radiation is part of combat or industry.
Deals a heavy slash to the target and can drop a head on kill. It is a focused execution-style offensive trick.
Breaks specific blocks and transmutes them into other items. The Material Mutator machine can perform this processing using power and Psionic Echo Gas.
